title: eragrostis cimicina
intro: Eragrostis cimicina, also known as devil's grass or snake grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Eragrostis cimicina include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of heart disease, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Eragrostis cimicina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
